title: inga manabiensis
intro: Inga manabiensis is a species of plant that belongs to the Inga genus, native to Ecuador and Peru, and is known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. Inga manabiensis has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, among other health problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are sometimes used in traditional medicine to create medicinal preparations.
